context.description: Implement property-based tests for progression system using fast-check

decision.rationale: Complexity 5/10, low risk, following established property testing patterns from Phase 4

coverage: Experience accumulates correctly for any positive amount
Level up triggers when threshold reached
Multiple level ups with large experience gains
All base stats increase on level up
Stat points granted on level up
Max health/mana increase based on vitality/energy
Current health/mana increase on level up
Stat increases scale with multiple level ups
Stat invariants maintained after level up
Experience reward based on level difference (50%-150% range)

patterns: Helper function for test character creation

issuesEncountered.issue: Floating point precision in experience reward calculation
issuesEncountered.description: Test expected >= 129.5 but got 129 due to Math.floor rounding
issuesEncountered.solution: Use Math.floor() and Math.ceil() for boundary checks to account for integer rounding

lessonsLearned: Account for Math.floor/ceil rounding in property tests with floating point calculations
Property tests excellent for validating progression mechanics (1000+ test cases)
Helper functions reduce test code duplication
